title: Maze Graphs, Connectivity, Cycles, Components, and Trees
description: The solver treats walls as edges, generation visits display objects, disconnected cells are hidden, and tree claims rely on appearance. Learners cumulatively produce validated maze graph adapter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Map each cell to a vertex and each reciprocal open passage to an undirected edge without leaking render state.
Use traversal evidence to count connected components and produce a witness for an unreachable cell.
Detect or construct a cycle witness rather than infer cycles from edge count alone on an unvalidated graph.
